message:
refactor(e2e): Use let-chains for cleaner if-let-success patterns

Refactor FailureDump methods to use Rust let-chains (if let .. && ..)
instead of nested if-let expressions:

- dump_database_state: Flatten tables_output check
- dump_git_state: Flatten branch_output and commit_output checks

This is a stylistic improvement using stable Rust let-chains (RFC 2497)
that reduces nesting depth and improves readability without changing
behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
